description_long: This hammer features a robust, industrial design with a cylindrical metallic head encased in riveted steel plates and wooden panels. The head is equipped with a large, iridescent, axe-like blade on one side, giving it a hybrid appearance between a hammer and a battle axe. The handle is mechanical, constructed from metal with visible joints and a reinforced grip, suggesting it is designed for heavy-duty or specialized tasks. A triangular warning symbol is painted on the wooden section of the head, and there are bolts, brackets, and a red metallic cap at the rear. The hammer also has a blue metallic guard or stabilizer extending from the side, adding to its complex, engineered look. The overall aesthetic is rugged and functional, with a mix of metallic, wooden, and painted surfaces.
description: A heavy-duty, industrial hammer with a cylindrical metal and wood head, featuring a large axe blade and a mechanical metal handle. It has a rugged, engineered appearance with visible bolts, a warning symbol, and a blue stabilizer.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full axe blade, wooden panels, warning symbol, and blue stabilizer.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular face of the hammer head, the blue stabilizer, and the alignment of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other side of the axe blade, wooden panels, and the red metallic cap at the rear.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the handle, the red cap, and the mechanical structure of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight mechanical metal handle with visible joints and reinforced grip, likely steel, with a textured industrial finish.
attribute_head_type: Hybrid hammer head with a cylindrical steel core, wooden side panels, and a large, curved axe blade attached to one side; striking face is flat and robust.
attribute_brand_or_logo: Triangular warning symbol with an exclamation mark, no brand name visible.
